title: Targets
description: Specify which users, mailboxes, and sites may be modified. Enable a category and list its targets, one per line.

identities.label: Identities
identities.hint: User accounts that may be modified, as UPNs

mail.label: Mail
mail.hint: Mailboxes whose messages may be modified, as UPNs

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.hint: Mailboxes whose calendars may be modified, as UPNs

onedrive.label: OneDrive
onedrive.hint: Users whose OneDrive files may be modified, as UPNs

sharepoint.label: SharePoint
sharepoint.hint: Site URLs whose contents may be modified (the https:// prefix is optional)

placeholderUpns: One UPN per line, e.g. user@contoso.com
placeholderUrls: One site URL per line, e.g. contoso.sharepoint.com/sites/marketing
loadFromTenant: Load all matching objects from the tenant
importCsv: Import targets from a CSV file

toast.csvEmpty: The CSV file contained no usable entries
toast.csvReadFailed: Could not read the CSV file
toast.nothingToCheck: Enter at least one target to check
toast.loadEmpty: No matching objects found in the tenant
